children.text: Commit to 12 months and save up to
. All commitment lengths billed monthly, choose at checkout.

layout.title: Not ready for 4 months?
layout.subtitle: Start with Core, same gut sequencing, same personalised formula, paid monthly with no commitment. Upgrade to Advanced anytime your biology asks for more.

items.question: When am I first charged €149?
items.answer: Your card is authorised at order but charged only when your formula enters manufacture, around two weeks after you send back your sample. Nothing before then.

items.question: What if I don't return my sample in time?
items.answer: If you never return your sample, a one-time €49 diagnostic-kit fee applies. Return it and there's no separate charge, your kit goes straight into sequencing and then manufacture. We'll send reminders, and the kit doesn't expire.

items.question: When do my blood biomarkers start?
items.answer: Blood biomarkers begin from your cycle-2 retest (around week 12) and then alternate with gut sequencing each cycle, so every rebuild is read against fresh data.

items.question: How does the 140+ ingredient library work?
items.answer: Advanced formulas can draw on our full library of 140+ premium actives. Your researcher adds them on request when your diagnostic data supports it, never as upsells, only where the evidence points.

items.question: How does the diagnostic actually work?
items.answer: Shotgun metagenomic sequencing reads the functional genes in your gut at species level, what your bacteria do, not just which are present, located against 8,069 reference metagenomes.
